title: AI Based Prediction System For Slow Payment Transactions
description: Developed an end-to-end Machine Learning system to predict slow payment transactions using historical financial datasets.
businessProblem: High volume of slow payment transactions resulting in operational inefficiencies and cash flow bottlenecks for enterprise finance teams.
solution: Engineered an automated prediction model using Logistic Regression, Random Forest, and Neural Networks to identify at-risk transactions before processing.
businessImpact: Improved prediction accuracy by 50%, enabling proactive intervention and reducing late payment processing overhead.
